name: @shippo/shippo-mcp
description: Multi-carrier shipping for AI agents: compare rates, buy labels, track packages, and validate addresses. Local bridge to the hosted Shippo MCP server.

shippo_api_key.title: Shippo API key (optional)
shippo_api_key.description: Leave blank to sign in with OAuth in your browser (recommended). Or paste a Shippo API key (shippo_test_... or shippo_live_...) for headless / API-key use once the hosted key door is enabled.
